title: TOPDON AL500B OBD2 Code Reader, OBD2 Scanner with Full OBD2 Functions and Battery Tester with 12V Battery Tests, 12V 24V Cranking and Charging Tests, Free Software Update
features: OBD2 SCANNER AND BATTERY TESTER: the AL500B is a 2-in-1 tool that works as an OBD2 code reader and 12V battery tester. Cranking and charging tests are supported for 12/24V batteries

10+ OBD2 FUNCTIONS: it supports full OBD2 functionalities, including reading and clearing DTCs, viewing Freeze Frame Data, and performing ECU version lookup. It boasts a one-touch I/M ready button for a quick smog status check and intuitively displays data stream with a waveform graph

FREE SOFTWARE UPDATE: this code reader can be upgraded for free, simply connect the device to a computer and install the updates through TOPDON's website. Scanners with similar features usually require yearly subscriptions
PRINT REPORTS: this scanner enables you to print diagnostic reports and battery tests for effortless saving and review
MULTI-LANGUAGE: both the menu and DTC definitions are available in 7 languages English, French, German, Spanish, Portuguese, Japanese.

WIDE COMPATIBILITY: this OBD2 code reader works on most US-based cars since 1996, EU-based cars after 2000, and Asian-based cars after 2008. Our hotline provides 24-hour technical support for prompt problem resolution.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 Full OBDE Functions 2 Check Engine Light 3 Pass Smog Test 4 Save Big on Diagnose Previous page Next page 1 12V 100-2000CCA Test 2 12V Battery Tester 3 12/24V Cranking Test 4 12/24V Charging Test 5 On/off Car Test
